recommendations.director: Danny Pang Phat, Oxide Pang Chun

recommendations.title: Re-cycle

recommendations.director: Danny Pang Phat, Oxide Pang Chun

recommendations.title: The Messengers
recommendations.overview: When the Solomons trade in the craziness of big-city life for the quiet of a North Dakota farm, little do they expect the nightmare that follows. Soon after arriving, teenage Jess and her younger brother see terrifying apparitions and endure attacks
recommendations.director: Oxide Pang Chun, Danny Pang Phat

recommendations.title: Bangkok Dangerous

recommendations.director: Oxide Pang Chun, Danny Pang Phat

recommendations.title: War Horse

recommendations.title: Hereditary
recommendations.overview: Following the death of the Leigh family matriarch, Annie and her children uncover disturbing secrets about their heritage. Their daily lives are not only impacted, but they also become entangled in a chilling fate from which they cannot escape, drivi

recommendations.title: The Nanny
recommendations.overview: Nanny, a London family's live-in maid, brings morbid 10-year-old Joey back from the psychiatric ward he's been in for two years, since the death of his younger sister. Joey refuses to eat any food Nanny's prepared or take a bath with her in the room.

recommendations.title: Jacob's Ladder
recommendations.overview: After returning home from the Vietnam War, veteran Jacob Singer struggles to maintain his sanity. Plagued by hallucinations and flashbacks, Singer rapidly falls apart as the world and people around him morph and twist into disturbing images. His girl

recommendations.title: I Love You to Death
recommendations.overview: Joey Boca is the owner of a pizza parlour, and has been married to Rosalie for years. When Rosalie discovers that Joey is a womanizer and has been cheating on her for a long time, she goes to extreme lengths to punish him.

recommendations.title: About Alex
recommendations.overview: When a group of old college friends reunite over a long weekend after one of them attempts suicide, old crushes and resentments shine light on their life decisions, and ultimately push friendships and relationships to the brink.
